prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A new engineer is onboarding to the Kafka Streams team. Find the key Java source files in `apache/kafka` under `streams/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/streams/` that define the core streaming topology abstractions. Specifically find: 1. The interface or abstract class that defines a `Topology` (the DAG of processing nodes). 2. The class that implements `StreamsBuilder` (the DSL for building topologies). 3. The class that implements `KafkaStreams` (the runtime that executes a topology). Report the repo, file path, and class name for each.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
